name: Dry Ginger
methodDescription: Dug up, boiled briefly, and sun-dried.
specimenCopy: Dried until it's roughly a fifth of its fresh weight. A deeper, warmer, more resinous character than fresh — the kind of difference that matters in a spice the kitchen uses without thinking much about where it came from.
offeringCopy: From the flatlands at the edge of the Western Ghats.
